generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in supporting our allies to keep America safe. But have you seen how much we're spending on defense compared to what our partners contribute? It's time we have an honest conversation about burden-sharing. Our current commitments might be leaving us vulnerable while others benefit. Let's ensure our security comes first without abandoning our values. #StrongAlliances #SmartSecurity
